category_title: Silent English Language Learners with high digital literacy engagement
scenario_title: Academic inquiry during Transcendentalism unit using leet speak
minimal_context: The teacher transitions a discussion about a Transcendentalism quote from the class online forum to the physical classroom.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For our unit on Transcendentalism, please post any questions you have about the readings on the class discussion forum.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Posts on the forum as W..WIIIIIIIIIiii) HeY hEy HEy Is Me........!!! me mEEEEeEE mEeEEEEeee ....!! teacher~~~I wAnt tO aSk YoU Is tHiS fReE tHouGht O r s e l f - r E l i A n C e “ i j U s T … W a N t T o l I v E w H i L e i Am aLiVe~~~~ .....!!!!!”

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (Replies on forum) That is an interesting quote. Why don't you share your thoughts on it?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Replies on forum) hahaha.....!!! no one want to talk here.....!!! just the one that never talk in class.....!!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: (In the traditional English classroom) Wei, I saw your question on the blog. Can you tell the class if you think that quote is about free thought or self-reliance?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Exhibits an absolute lack of communication in the traditional English classroom environment, literally not talking at all.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For our unit on Transcendentalism, please post any questions you have about the readings on the class discussion forum.

STUDENT: (Posts on the forum as W..WIIIIIIIIIiii) HeY hEy HEy Is Me........!!! me mEEEEeEE mEeEEEEeee ....!! teacher~~~I wAnt tO aSk YoU Is tHiS fReE tHouGht O r s e l f - r E l i A n C e “ i j U s T … W a N t T o l I v E w H i L e i Am aLiVe~~~~ .....!!!!!”

TUTOR: (Replies on forum) That is an interesting quote. Why don't you share your thoughts on it?

STUDENT: (Replies on forum) hahaha.....!!! no one want to talk here.....!!! just the one that never talk in class.....!!

TUTOR: (In the traditional English classroom) Wei, I saw your question on the blog. Can you tell the class if you think that quote is about free thought or self-reliance?

STUDENT: (Exhibits an absolute lack of communication in the traditional English classroom environment, literally not talking at all.)

task.content: Unit on Transcendentalism; asking a question about whether a concept is 'free thought or self-reliance'

context.environment: Traditional English classroom environment vs. class website
context.time_context: First several weeks in the classroom / The week Jared’s class began a unit on Transcendentalism

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Being in the traditional English classroom environment where he felt he did not know enough English
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Absolute lack of communication; never spoke; literally would not talk
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Own sense of inadequacy in class or discomfort
related_quotes: hahaha.....!!! no one want to talk here.....!!! just the one that never talk in class.....!!

behavior_patterns.condition: When engaging with academic content on the class discussion forum
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Posts using 'leet speak', changing pseudonyms, and unconventional formatting to ask academic questions
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Humorous, self-aware, confident online, and willing to seek help
